title: dionysia viscidula
intro: Dionysia viscidula is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae, commonly known as a type of primrose, native to Iran. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Persian medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dionysia viscidula include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
